---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpeg # Replace with the name of an image file in your folder
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: youtube
      text: YouTube
      href: https://youtube.com/@AnantKumarPlus
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/kaymant
    - icon: globe
      text: Classes
      href: https://classes.anantkumar.online # Your future classes subdomain
---

Hi, I am Anant Kumar. 

I am an educator, a tinkerer, lifelong learner, and data science enthusiast. With over 18 years of experience as a private educator specializing in Mathematics and Physics, I run Anant Kumar Classes, where I mentor students preparing for the rigorous IITJEE exams. My teaching philosophy revolves around building a deep, intuitive understanding of complex scientific concepts. I am passionate about making learning engaging and accessible, and I strive to create content that inspires curiosity and fosters a love for learning.

My academic journey is a blend of traditional engineering and modern data science. I completed four years of undergraduate coursework in Electrical Engineering at IIT Kanpur (2000–2004) and am currently pursuing a BS in Data Science and Applications at IIT Madras, with an expected graduation in December 2026. At IIT Madras, I actively contribute to the academic community as a Teaching Assistant for *Machine Learning Foundations* and *Maths II for Electronics*, and as a Student Mentor for *Mathematics I*.

### What You Will Find Here

This blog is a space where I share my explorations at the intersection of mathematics, programming, and education. You can expect content focused on:

* **Interactive Mathematics:** Breaking down abstract ideas, such as how matrix multiplication affects a two-dimensional space, using linear algebra, JavaScript animations, and the Manim library.
* **AI & Coding for Students:** Making artificial intelligence and programming accessible and engaging for high school audiences.
* **Tech in Education:** My experiences building offline LLMs, utilizing LaTeX and Python, and creating high-quality educational videos.

My goal is to make learning accessible, visual, and engaging. Thank you for stopping by!
